# Journal Presets

Filter works to top-tier venues using ISSN lists with `primary_location.source.issn:ISSN1|ISSN2|...`:

## UTD24 (UT Dallas 24 -- business school rankings)
```
0001-4826|0001-8392|0011-7315|1042-2587|0090-4848|1047-7047|0165-4101|0021-8456|0167-4544|0883-9026|1057-7408|0093-5301|0022-1082|0022-1090|0304-405X|0047-2506|0149-2063|0742-1222|0022-2380|0022-2429|0022-2437|0272-6963|0022-3808|0022-4359|0276-7783|0025-1909|1523-4614|0732-2399|0030-364X|1047-7039|1059-1478|1380-6653|0893-9454|0143-2095
```

## FT50 (Financial Times 50)
```
0001-4826|0361-3682|0001-8392|0002-8282|0823-9150|0011-7315|0012-9682|1042-2587|0018-7267|0090-4848|1047-7047|0165-4101|0021-8456|0021-9010|0167-4544|0883-9026|1057-7408|0093-5301|1058-6407|0022-1082|0022-1090|0304-405X|0047-2506|0149-2063|0742-1222|0022-2380|0022-2429|0022-2437|0272-6963|0022-3808|0022-4359|0092-0703|0276-7783|0025-1909|1523-4614|0732-2399|0030-364X|0170-8406|1059-1478|0033-5533|0741-6261|0048-7333|1380-6653|0034-6527|1572-3097|0893-9454|1532-9194|0143-2095|0734-306X|0008-1256
```

## ABS4* (AJG World Elite)
```
0001-8392|0002-8282|0012-9682|0021-9010|1057-7408|0093-5301|0022-1082|0304-405X|0149-2063|0022-2429|0276-7783|0025-1909|0030-364X|1047-7039|0022-3808|0033-5533|0741-6261|0034-6527|0893-9454|0143-2095|0022-2380|0047-2506|1047-7047|0165-4101
```

## Example: Search UTD24 papers on a topic
```bash
UTD="0001-4826|0001-8392|0011-7315|1042-2587|0090-4848|1047-7047|0165-4101|0021-8456|0167-4544|0883-9026|1057-7408|0093-5301|0022-1082|0022-1090|0304-405X|0047-2506|0149-2063|0742-1222|0022-2380|0022-2429|0022-2437|0272-6963|0022-3808|0022-4359|0276-7783|0025-1909|1523-4614|0732-2399|0030-364X|1047-7039|1059-1478|1380-6653|0893-9454|0143-2095"
curl -s "https://api.openalex.org/works?search=artificial+intelligence&filter=primary_location.source.issn:${UTD},from_publication_date:2023-01-01&sort=cited_by_count:desc&per_page=10&select=id,doi,title,publication_year,cited_by_count,authorships,primary_location" \
  | jq '.results[] | {title, year: .publication_year, cited: .cited_by_count, venue: .primary_location.source.display_name, authors: [.authorships[:3][].author.display_name]}'
```
